commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

commit.message:
fix: use gemini-2.0-flash (gemini-1.5-flash discontinued)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: detect BLE disconnects on Linux via D-Bus property watching

The tinygo/bluetooth library's SetConnectHandler never fires on
Linux because the D-Bus signal listener is torn down after initial
connection. Add a platform-specific watchdog that monitors the
BlueZ org.bluez.Device1.Connected property via D-Bus signals.
When the property changes to false, handleDisconnect is triggered,
enabling automatic reconnection on Linux.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: Database 모듈 템플릿화 3종 적용

1. IResultSet — name 오버로드 default 구현으로 승격
   - GetString/GetInt/GetLong/GetDouble/GetBool/IsNull (name) 6개를
     pure virtual에서 FindColumn + index 오버로드 위임 default impl로 변경
   - ODBC/OLE DB/SQLite ResultSet에서 동일한 1줄 오버로드 18개 제거

2. *ResultSet — ParseAs<T> static 템플릿 (ODBC / OLE DB)
   - if constexpr으로 stoi/stoll/stod 분기; 실패 시 defaultVal 반환
   - GetInt/GetLong/GetDouble 본체에서 중복 try-catch 제거

3. *Statement — SetParam / SetNumParam 템플릿
   - ODBCStatement: SetParam<TypeTag, FieldPtr> — resize + 필드 할당 1-liner화
     (BindParameter int/long long/double 3개 적용)
   - OLEDBStatement: SetParam<TypeTag, FieldPtr> — 동일 패턴 + index==0 가드 포함
   - SQLiteStatement: SetNumParam<TypeTag, T> — is_floating_point_v 분기로
     int/long long → int64Val, double → realVal 자동 선택

테스트: SQLite 23/23 PASS (빌드 + 실행 검증)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Disambiguate tabs with same filename using parent directory

When multiple tabs share the same filename (e.g. two "Package.swift"),

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 3 bugs — community delete, personal list pollution, login after account creation

[Bug1] DELETE /community never fired
  - getUiSettings() no longer contains globalUrl (removed in prev commit)
  - `if(_ds.globalUrl)` was always false → server delete never called
  - Fix: use effectiveGlobalUrl() instead
  - Fix: server-first order (delete server → on success remove local)
  - Fix: deleteCommunityEntryFromGlobal() now returns boolean

[Bug2] Community players leaked into personal list (namesBox / LS.names)
  - doStart() called getActiveNames() (personal ∪ community union)
    then saved the union to LS.names → community players in namesBox on reload
  - Fix: save only parseNames(namesBox.value) to LS.names in personal mode

[Bug3] Login fails immediately after account creation
  - fetchAuthConfig() sets _backendAllowedUsers=[] on load (not null)
  - getEffectiveAllowedUsers() returned [] instead of local list
  - New account saved to localStorage was never checked for login
  - Fix: set _backendAllowedUsers=null after btnAddUser saves locally

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace django-redis lock with cache.add() based lock

django-redis was not installed in the running container, causing
InvalidCacheBackendError. Replaced with a dependency-free distributed
lock using cache.add() (atomic test-and-set) which works with Django's
built-in RedisCache backend.

Add near-side Maestro worker for physical Android phones

Physical Android E2E tests were 18x slower than emulated (~55s/tap vs
~3s) due to every Maestro ADB command traversing the cross-host SSH
tunnel. Fix: create a worker container (smithr-phone-worker) colocated
with the phone on the same Docker host.

- devices.clj: auto-create/remove worker containers alongside bridges,
  enable TCP mode (adb tcpip) for forward chain, add pool label
- adb-proxy: add USB mode entrypoint for compose-layer standalone use
- physical-phone.yml: switch to USB mode with smithr-adb-proxy image

CI script (Artha e2e-maestro.sh) drives the worker via SSH + docker
exec, bypassing the tunnel entirely for Maestro commands.

Initial commit — dataChef JSON Query & ETL platform

Full Next.js 14 (App Router) application with:

  with OAuth2 client-credentials flow and step-by-step setup guide in the wizard
- 7 datasets: 2 live (Rick & Morty API, synthetic events) + 5 deterministic mock
- Dark theme design system (indigo/violet accent, JetBrains Mono for code)
- Docker: multi-stage Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml (zero-config start on :3333)

commit.message:
docs: SCIENTOMETRICS.md — ratissage littérature, formules récupérables

15+ formules publiées identifiées en 4 tiers de priorité:
- Tier 1: Adamic-Adar, Katz, Burt Constraint (zero rescan, calcul pur)
- Tier 2: Converging distance, Structural entropy, Sleeping Beauty (frames)
- Tier 3: Node2Vec, FutureRank (embeddings alternatifs)
- Tier 4: BERTrend, Temporal motifs (signaux faibles)
Plan d'intégration: après WT3 pour Tier 1, avec V3 pour Tier 2, V4 pour Tier 3.

Add per-feature wiki pages with LOC analysis

- Calculate lines of code changes (LOC) per file
- Create separate .md file for each significant change (>50 LOC or 5+ files)
- Each feature page starts with summary at top
- Main README links to all feature pages
- Detect significance: >50 LOC or >5 files changed = new page

Now when you add a new feature:
1. System analyzes LOC changes
2. If significant, creates .schemaWiki/features/feature-name.md
3. Main README links to it
4. Each page has summary, overview, changes, commit details

mdx: open_sp 이중 공백 수정에 따른 MDX 재생성 (KO/EN/JA) (#890)

## Description
- Forward Converter의 inline element `open_sp` 이중 공백 방지(#887) 병합에 따라 영향받는
MDX 파일을 재생성합니다.
- KO 6개 파일 재변환 후 EN 3개, JA 4개 파일에 동일 변경을 동기화합니다.
- 변경은 모두 `  **` (이중 공백) → ` **` (단일 공백)만 해당합니다.
- en/ja에 이미 이중 공백이 없는 파일(번역문 구조가 다른 경우)은 변경 대상에서 제외되었습니다.

## Added/updated tests?
- [x] No, and this is why: 문서 콘텐츠 변경만 해당하며 변환기 로직 변경 없음

## Additional notes
- 선행 PR: #887 (Forward Converter open_sp 이중 공백 방지)

feat: replace Random with Composite Contrarian strategy

Stacks all game theory edges into one optimal pick:
- High zone weighting (3x bias toward 32-49, anti-birthday)
- Excludes round numbers (5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40,45)
- Excludes top 10 most frequent (hot) numbers
- Enforces minimum gap of 5 between numbers (anti-clustering)

commit.message:
fix: hardcode Supabase URL fallback in all server routes

On Cloudflare Workers, NEXT_PUBLIC_* vars are inlined at build time.
If not set during build, they become undefined at runtime. Added
hardcoded fallback URL (public, not a secret) to all 10 server-side
files that use getAdminSupabase(), matching the pattern already used
in the client-side code.
